hooks.command: file_path=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file_path" == *Cargo.lock* ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit Cargo.lock directly' >&2; exit 2; fi
file_path=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file_path" == *.rs ]]; then cd src-tauri && cargo fmt -- "$file_path" 2>/dev/null; fi
file_path=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file_path" == *.rs ]]; then cd src-tauri && cargo check 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
echo '✓ Claude finished. Remember: cargo test before commit!' >&2
